Terms of Service

Last updated: June 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using our game, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of the terms then you may not access the service.

2. User Accounts

When you create an account with us, you must provide us information that is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of the Terms, which may result in immediate termination of your account.

3. Fair Play and Leaderboards

Exploiting bugs, using third-party software for advantages, or artificially manipulating leaderboard scores is strictly prohibited. We reserve the right to remove accounts found in violation of fair play guidelines.

4. Termination

We may terminate or suspend access to our service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.
